gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables, while dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor, and tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps; students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens, where healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos; additionally, event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards at the entrance, and career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact, while students clutch resumes inside branded folders, and a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system, and alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: A welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system, and at the entrance, event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards; additionally, career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact, while students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens; furthermore, healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos; consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables, dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor, tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps, and alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station, while students clutch resumes inside branded folders.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens, where healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos; at the entrance, event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards, and a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system; within the space, dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor, and consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables.
Additionally, career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact, and students clutch resumes inside branded folders; meanwhile, tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables, and healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos; additionally, a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system, and at the entrance, event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards; alumni volunteers also share quick pep talks near the coffee station.

Dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor, and furthermore, students clutch resumes inside branded folders, and career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact, as students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens, and additionally, tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables; meanwhile, dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor, and event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards at the entrance, and healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos, while tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps; additionally, career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact, students clutch resumes inside branded folders, and a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system, as students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.

Dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor, and consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables; furthermore, students clutch resumes inside branded folders, and healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos.

Career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact, as students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens, and alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station.
